name: ASIX Electronics Corporation
summary: ASIX Electronics Corporation, an IC Design company, supplies fabless semiconductors with focus on networking, communication, and connectivity applications. The company provides industrial, SuperSpeed USB, and Non-PCI/SPI embedded Ethernet ICs, as well as interface ICs; and RS-232/RS-485 UART transceivers and USB KVM Switch/Wi-Fi/Ethernet SoCs. It offers its products for smart factory, industrial automation, industrial IoT, smart home and office, PC and peripheral, interface connectivity, and USB KVM switch applications. ASIX Electronics Corporation was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
